creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please take another look at the Makefile in gnuplot.  You'll see that the LIB_DEPENDS setting is in the .else part of the .if defined(LITE) section.  So libgd is not pulled in when building gnuplot-lite, as we can see by printing out LIB_DEPENDS:

gnuplot-lite> make -V LIB_DEPENDS                                         
libreadline.so.8:devel/readline
gnuplot-lite>

I.e. gnuplot-lite only depends on the readline port.
